data.title: Saylor hints at larger Bitcoin purchase post announcing $1B buy and semi-monthly dividends plan.
data.description: Michael Saylor from Strategy recently shared a post titled "Think Even Bigger" on Sunday, following the disclosure of purchasing $1 billion worth of Bitcoin just a week prior.

data.title: E3 Lithium Set to Begin Operations for Phase 2 of the Demonstration Facility
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd., a prominent player in Canadian lithium development, has announced the successful completion of well development and pump installation for Phase 2 of its Demonstration Facility. The company, listed on TSXV as ETL, FSE as OW3, and OTCQX as EEMMF, is now prepared to kick off operations. With a comprehensive three-phase plan in place, E3 Lithium aims to showcase the viability of manufacturing battery-grade lithium carbonate. Initially detailed on March 9, 2026, the project has set ambitious objectives for each stage to pave the way towards commercial success.

China foreign ministry, on US-Iran talks: The current situation is at a critical stage

data.title: Labbit Goes All-In on LIMS Platform, Retires Semaphore Solutions Brand
data.description: A company specializing in laboratory systems for regulated labs has recently rebranded as Labbit after ten years of operation. This decision was made to concentrate solely on their advanced LIMS platform. Labbit, located in Vancouver, British Columbia, made this shift on April 20, 2026. Their LIMS platform is recognized for its modernity and is designed to cater to the needs of regulated laboratories. This strategic move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its services in this sector.

data.title: ILOS Upsizes Credit Facility to €450 Million With EIG and La Caisse
data.description: In London, ILOS Projects, a Pan-European Independent Power Producer, revealed an expansion in its structured credit facility with EIG and La Caisse, with backing from BNPP AM Alts. The facility has seen a successful upsizing to €450 million, from an initial tranche of €250 million. EIG, a notable institutional investor in energy and infrastructure sectors, and La Caisse, a global investment group, have both increased their commitment to support ILOS in its ventures.

data.title: MBRYONICS Announces Further Expansion in Its Customer Base and Manufacturing Facilities to Meet Rapidly Growing Demand
data.description: In Galway, Ireland and San Francisco, MBRYONICS has revealed an expansion of its partner and customer network with a recent selection by the European Space Agency (ESA) for in-orbit demonstration efforts alongside Kepler Communications. This collaboration falls under the High-throughput Optical Network (HydRON) program's Element 3, a part of ESA's Optical and Quantum Communications – ScyLight initiative, within the Advanced Research in Telecommunications Systems (AR) program. The award amounts to €18.6 million, emphasizing the significant investment in advancing communication technologies in space.

data.title: InfluxData and Litmus Partner to Power Scalable Industrial AI at the Edge
data.description: In Hannover, Germany, InfluxData revealed a strategic collaboration with Litmus during Hannover Messe 2026. The partnership merges InfluxData's InfluxDB 3 Enterprise, a top-tier time series database, with Litmus Edge, a prominent Industrial Edge Data Platform provider. This integration offers industrial entities a robust platform to gather, handle, and scrutinize high-resolution data from all locations, systems, and sensors. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards enhancing data management capabilities for industrial companies at this influential industrial trade fair.

data.title: LG Innotek to Supply Cutting-Edge Automotive Wi-Fi 7 Communication Module to a leading European automotive parts company
data.description: A major contract worth around $68 million has been secured for the production of a new technology that promises data transmission speeds three times faster than current standards. The product will maintain this high speed even when multiple devices are connected at the same time. This advancement is poised to transform the way cars are perceived, moving them from simply a mode of transportation to a 'second living space'. Mass production is scheduled to commence in 2027, marking a significant step in this trend towards enhanced in-car connectivity.

data.title: Rockwell Automation to Demonstrate AI‑Orchestrated Factory System Design at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: In Düsseldorf, Germany, on April 20, 2026, Rockwell Automation, the leading company in industrial automation and digital transformation globally, will unveil an innovative method for industrial automation engineering at Hannover Messe 2026. This demonstration will highlight the utilization of AI-orchestrated technologies to advance the field.

data.title: Bracco Imaging and NYU Langone Health Announce Strategic Alliance Agreement to Advance Medical Imaging Innovation
data.description: A research partnership has been established between Bracco Imaging and NYU Langone Health, with the goal of advancing innovation in MRI, CT, Ultrasound, and PET/CT imaging. This strategic alliance, announced today in Milan, is set to span multiple years and aims to drive progress in the field of medical imaging.

data.title: Ontinue Opens New Headquarters in Zurich, Strengthening Commitment to European Growth and Innovation
data.description: Continuing its commitment to talent, customers, and security excellence in the DACH region and beyond, Ontinue revealed the establishment of a new office in Zurich on April 20, 2026. Ontinue, known for its nonstop managed security operations via the Agentic SOC, aims to further its reach and impact. This move signifies an investment in expanding its presence and capabilities, catering to a wider audience.

data.title: Rosiwit Showcases Sustainable Innovation at Interclean Amsterdam 2026
data.description: During the Interclean Amsterdam 2026 event, Rosiwit showcased their new advancements in sustainability-focused cleaning technologies and cybersecurity enhancements for industrial settings. The company, known for providing intelligent cleaning solutions, highlighted their commitment to eco-friendly practices and security measures. Attendees had the opportunity to learn about these innovations first-hand.

data.title: Lexar expands SILVER PLUS series with new 2TB microSDXC UHS-I card delivering industry-leading read speeds and higher capacity
data.description: Lexar, a global leader in microSD cards, has released a new version of their SILVER PLUS series, which is endorsed by DJI as their recommended microSD cards. The latest capacity version offers increased storage space and faster speeds, expanding the options for use with DJI models. This release comes after the previous success of the SILVER PLUS series. The announcement was made in San Jose, California on April 20, 2026, through a press release. This development signifies a significant advancement in the field, incorporating cutting-edge technology to enhance user experience.

data.title: CAMSO Construction Enters Key European Markets with Strong On-Ground Readiness
data.description: Camso Construction recently disclosed its preparedness for market entry in major European countries including France, Italy, Spain, and Portugal. This move signifies the initial stage of its intended business growth strategy subsequent to RPG Group's takeover of the compact construction tires.

data.title: Echodyne Named as Radar System for Trust Automation’s $490M Air Force Counter-UAS Engineering Contract
data.description: In Kirkland, Washington, Echodyne, a radar platform company, revealed its integration as a main radar system in Trust Automation’s Small-Unmanned Air Defense System (SUADS) Counter-UAS platform. This platform is set to be supplied to the U.S. Air Force as part of a $490 million Indefinite Delivery Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract that was announced in August 2025. The contract includes the delivery of different systems such as the Rapidly Deployable Small-Unmanned Air Defense System (RD-SUADS), Fixed Site Small-Unmanned Air Defense System (FS-SUADS), and Expeditionary Small-Unmanned Air Defense System (EX-SUADS).

data.title: Share buyback programme – week 16
data.description: The Danish Financial Supervisory Authority along with other key stakeholders within the financial sector are currently in discussions regarding the potential listing of a company on various stock exchanges. The stock exchanges under consideration include Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and the London Stock Exchange. This move is expected to bring in significant investments, with the company aiming to raise approximately [specify amount] through the listing. The involvement of these prominent stock exchanges further underscores the widespread interest and potential impact of this listing on the financial market.
